hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in */proto/duel.proto|proto/duel.proto) [ -f scripts/gen_proto.sh ] && bash scripts/gen_proto.sh;; esac 2>/dev/null || true

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in */server/*.py|server/*.py) command -v ruff >/dev/null && [ -f "$f" ] && { ruff format "$f"; ruff check --fix --unsafe-fixes "$f"; };; esac 2>/dev/null || true
f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in */server/*.py|server/*.py|*/scripts/*.py|scripts/*.py) [ -f "$f" ] && bash scripts/pyright_check.sh "$f";; esac 2>/dev/null || true
